_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: the protein expression levels of neurofibromin in the four groups were evaluated by Western blotting. The results showed that the expression of neurofibromin in group C and group NC was normal. However, neurofibromin expression was undetectable in 2−7 and 2−12 cell lines
details: Successfully detected neurofibromin protein expression by Western blotting and immunofluorescence, showing normal expression in control cells and undetectable expression in NF1 knockout cell lines
